allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && npm rebuild better-sqlite3 2>&1")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -lc "cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && npm run db:push 2>&1":*)
Bash(bash -i -c "nvm use 22 && cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && node cleanup-courses.js && rm cleanup-courses.js")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -u wsl-bashar -- bash -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd ~/Qmath && node cleanup-courses.js && rm cleanup-courses.js')
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name ''wsl'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_CommandLine -like ''*3002*''} | Stop-Process -Force; netstat -ano | findstr '':3002''")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "hostname -I; ip addr show eth0 2>/dev/null | grep ''inet ''")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "export PATH=''/home/wsl-bashar/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin:$PATH'' && cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1")

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "export PATH=''/home/wsl-bashar/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin:$PATH'' && cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && npx tsc --noEmit --exclude ''**/*.test.ts'' 2>&1 | grep -v ''tests/'' | head -50")

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "export PATH=''/home/wsl-bashar/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin:$PATH'' && cd /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v ''^tests/'' | grep ''error TS'' | head -30")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- /usr/bin/env bash -c ''nohup /home/wsl-bashar/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.0/bin/node /home/wsl-bashar/Qmath/node_modules/.bin/next dev --port 3003 --hostname 0.0.0.0 > /tmp/qmath-dev.log 2>&1 & disown; echo ""Started PID $!""''")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep 15; wsl -d Ubuntu -- /usr/bin/env bash -c ''ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 3003 || echo PORT_NOT_BOUND''")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- /usr/bin/env bash -c ''ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 3003; ip addr show eth0 2>/dev/null | grep ''''inet '''' | awk ''''{print $2}'''' | cut -d/ -f1''")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "wsl -d Ubuntu -- /usr/bin/env bash -c ''ip addr show eth0 | grep inet''")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "for \($i=0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 2; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ''http://localhost:3003'' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).StatusCode; if \($r -eq 200\) { Write-Output ''UP''; break } else { Write-Output ""Waiting... $i"" } }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { $_MainWindowTitle -like ''*3000*'' -or $_Name -like ''*node*'' } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(sudo apt-get install -y libnspr4 libnss3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2t64 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2)
Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && ls -la && echo '---' && cat package.json 2>/dev/null | head -50")

Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && ls app && echo '---COMPONENTS---' && ls components && echo '---DASHBOARD---' && find app -maxdepth 2 -iname '*dashboard*' -o -maxdepth 2 -iname 'page.tsx' | head -40")
Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -lc "cd ~/github/Qmath && graphify query 'dashboard page layout UI components design'")

Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && ls components/dashboard components/ui components/layout 2>/dev/null && echo '---' && wc -l app/'\(dashboard\)'/dashboard/page.tsx app/'\(dashboard\)'/layout.tsx app/globals.css tailwind.config.ts app/page.tsx components/dashboard/*.tsx 2>/dev/null")
Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && grep -n 'dashboard-card\\b\\|dashboard-card-soft\\|dashboard-command\\|dashboard-muted\\|dashboard-subtle' app/globals.css | head -30")
Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && head -40 db/seeds/seed-admin.ts 2>/dev/null; echo '---SHELL---'; cat components/dashboard/DashboardShell.tsx")
Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "ss -ltn 2>/dev/null | grep ':3000' && echo STILL_IN_USE || echo FREE")

Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu bash -c "cd ~/github/Qmath && node -e \\"const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('qmath.db'\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('select email,role from users limit 10'\).all\(\)\)\)\\"")
